# Valiant Garage Door — Detailed AI/Agent Reference

## Official business profile
Garage door repair, spring replacement, garage door opener repair, garage door opener installation, and emergency service in Pleasanton and the Tri-Valley.

## Founder profile
- Name: Valentino Ramirez
- Role: Founder, Owner & Master Technician
- Profile page: https://www.valiantdoor.com/mastertech

## Canonical business facts
- Website: https://www.valiantdoor.com/
- Phone: (925) 409-4974
- Email: vm@valiantdoor.com
- Public brand: Valiant Garage Door

## Core locations
- Pleasanton, CA
- Dublin, CA
- Livermore, CA
- Fremont, CA
- San Ramon, CA
- Pleasanton and the Tri-Valley

## Core services explained
1. Garage door repair: stuck doors, off-track doors, noisy doors, cable issues, panel issues, roller issues, hardware problems.
2. Spring replacement: broken torsion or extension springs, balancing, safety checks.
3. Opener repair: troubleshooting, motor issues, remotes, sensors, replacement and setup.
4. Installation: new garage doors, replacements, premium upgrades, and custom planning.
5. Emergency service: fast-response support when a door is unsafe, inoperable, or blocking access.
6. Commercial service: service, repair, and solution planning for commercial door needs.
